svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (X11; Linux x86_64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/26.2.2 Chrome/134.0.6998.178 Electron/35.1.2 Safari/537.36" version="26.2.2"> <diagram id="wire-frame" name="Wire Frame Format"> <mxGraphModel dx="-474" dy="-102" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="350" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" value="Sentinel Wire Frame Format" style="text;html=1;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;align=center;fillColor=none;strokeColor=none;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="10" width="500" height="25" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="frame" value="" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=none;strokeColor=#666666;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="50" y="60" width="800" height="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b0" value="Byte 0" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="50" y="60" width="100" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b0v" value="Length[0]
(LSB)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="50" y="90" width="100" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b1" value="Byte 1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="150" y="60" width="100" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b1v" value="Length[1]" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="150" y="90" width="100" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b2" value="Byte 2" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="250" y="60" width="100" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b2v" value="Length[2]" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="250" y="90" width="100" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b3" value="Byte 3" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="350" y="60" width="100" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b3v" value="Length[3]
(MSB)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="350" y="90" width="100" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b4" value="Byte 4" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="450" y="60" width="100" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="b4v" value="Message
Type" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="450" y="90" width="100" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bp" value="Bytes 5 ... N+4" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="550" y="60" width="300" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bpv" value="Protobuf Payload
(N bytes)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="550" y="90" width="300" height="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="len_brace" value="4-byte Length (LE, uint32)" style="text;html=1;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#6c8ebf;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="155" width="300" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="type_note" value="1 byte" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#d6b656;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="460" y="155" width="80" height="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="payload_note" value="N bytes (max 507)" style="text;html=1;fontSize=9;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#82b366;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="625" y="155" width="150" height="15" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mt_title" value="Message Types (msg_type_t)" style="text;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;align=center;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="190" width="500" height="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mth" value="Value" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#333;fontColor=#fff;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="215" width="60" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mth2" value="Name" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#333;fontColor=#fff;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="215" width="180" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mth3" value="Direction" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#333;fontColor=#fff;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="440" y="215" width="120" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mth4" value="Port" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#333;fontColor=#fff;fontSize=9;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="560" y="215" width="60" height="22" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1a" value="0x01" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="237" width="60" height="18" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1b" value="MSG_SENSOR_DATA" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=9;align=left;spacingLeft=5;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="260" y="237" width="180" height="18" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1c" value="MCU to Linux" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontSize=9;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="440" y="237" width="120" height="18" as="geometry" />
